subcodes.first_line: Mine eyes shed tears, and my heart lamenteth, while my pen and tongue declare: Praise be unto Thee, O Lord of all the worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تذرف عینی و ینوح قلبی و قلمی و اللسان یقول لک الحمد یا اله العالمین بما
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @love of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
